extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Maestro process execution view with a BPMN-style workflow at the top and the execution trail and details panels at the bottom. The process is currently paused at the human task node "Manual Review and Validation," which is highlighted in the diagram and selected in the execution trail. In the Details panel, the Action Center task is available and an "Open app task" button is shown so the reviewer can complete the validation decision.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Execution trail, select the "Manual Review and Validation (User task)" step if it is not already selected.
2. In the Details panel, locate "User Task - Action Center."
3. Click on "Open app task" to open the human validation task in Action Center and review the invoice.
